title: fold feature-spec deltas into the durable living spec at mark-complete (LS·3)

commands.stdoutTail: [companion] Folded feature deltas into living spec(s): todos (examples/bench-sandboxes/ls-3/specs/001-add-due-dates/.spec-context.json)

config:
livingSpecs:
  enabled: true
  capabilities:
    - name: todos
      match: ["src/todos/**"]

livingSpec.before:
# Todos capability

### Users can add a todo

#### Scenario: add a todo
- WHEN a user types text and submits
- THEN a todo appears in the list
livingSpec.after:
# Todos capability

### Users can add a todo

#### Scenario: add a todo
- WHEN a user types text and submits
- THEN a todo appears in the list

### Users can set a due date on a todo

#### Scenario: set a due date
- WHEN a user picks a date for a todo
- THEN the todo shows the due date

#### Scenario: clear a due date
- WHEN a user clears the date
- THEN the todo shows no due date
livingSpec.unifiedDiff:
diff --git abefore.md bafter.md
index 3021866..68c58cc 100644
--- abefore.md
+++ bafter.md
@@ -5,3 +5,13 @@
 #### Scenario: add a todo
 - WHEN a user types text and submits
 - THEN a todo appears in the list
+
+### Users can set a due date on a todo
+
+#### Scenario: set a due date
+- WHEN a user picks a date for a todo
+- THEN the todo shows the due date
+
+#### Scenario: clear a due date
+- WHEN a user clears the date
+- THEN the todo shows no due date

assertions.detail: ADDED requirement present in capabilities/todos/spec.md after fold
re-running the fold left capabilities/todos/spec.md byte-identical
enabled:false -> living spec unchanged, no livingSpecs.synced

checks.detail: re-applying deltas to the after-spec is a byte no-op
